---
title: 'ECC: Platform-Independent Energy-Constrained Deep Neural Network Compression
  via a Bilinear Regression Model'
author:
- Haichuan Yang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Ji Liu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- mlsys
url_source: http://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_CVPR_2019/papers/Yang_ECC_Platform-Independent_Energy-Constrained_Deep_Neural_Network_Compression_via_a_Bilinear_CVPR_2019_paper.pdf
supp_source: http://openaccess.thecvf.com/content_CVPR_2019/supplemental/Yang_ECC_Platform-Independent_Energy-Constrained_CVPR_2019_supplemental.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/hyang1990/energy_constrained_compression
journ: CVPR
year: 2019
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
poster_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/cvpr19a_poster.pdf
pub_number: 28
---
